nasb.text: And He will send forth His angels with a great trumpet and they will gather together His elect from the four winds, from one end of the sky to the other.

esv.text: And he will send out his angels with a loud trumpet call, and they will gather his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.

cnv.text: 當號筒發出響聲，他要差派使者，把他的選民從四方，從天這邊到天那邊都招聚來。

ccb.text: 在响亮的号声中，祂将差遣天使从四面八方、天涯海角招聚祂拣选的人。

csbs.text: 在嘹亮的号角声中，他要差派他的天使们从四方，从天这边到天那边，召集他所拣选的人。
